case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. KEVIN JONES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$31.00) SERVED FEB-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, KEVIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, KEVIN $1,026.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,057.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2018 - JUDGMENT.
